analytics.last_inbound_snippet: Subject: Re: Merinaz X ZOCA | Minutes of the Meeting\n\nBody: Hello,shruti i don’t see the men’s section services on the website, and it’s a little confusing when viewing all the services. Could you please update it and list all the service

cause_analysis.narrative: Merinaz churned on 2026-04-17 after 60 days with Zoca. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 25 times, but the client only replied 5. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.
